description:
Farm Steam trading cards, manage achievements, and idle games automatically — an all-in-one alternative to ArchiSteamFarm, Steam Achievement Manager, and Idle Master

Steam Game Idler (SGI) is a Steam automation tool for farming trading cards, managing achievements, and boosting playtime across all games in your Steam library.
What's Changed
- feat(achievement-unlocker): add bulk add all to queue button to achie… by @zevnda in #1884
- fix(components): virtualized game grid cards incorrect width by @zevnda in #1885
- refactor(components): add indicator to all select components by @zevnda in #1886
- refactor(settings): exclude subscription data from export settings by @zevnda in #1887
- ci(i18n): strip empty placeholder strings from crowdin translation sync by @zevnda in #1888
- fix(tauri): use .log extension for log files by @zevnda in #1889
- feat(settings): add upgrade button to subscription tab by @zevnda in #1890
- ci(i18n): reclaim file ownership before writing by @zevnda in #1891
Full Changelog: 6.0.3...6.0.4
